task_completion.description: Select the original bracket body to prepare for mirroring.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bracket body is highlighted in the 3D viewport or selected in the Tree View (Combo View).

task_completion.description: Apply the Mirror operation across the YZ plane.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Mirror tool dialog is visible in the task panel, showing the YZ plane (or normal to X axis) selected as the mirror plane.

task_completion.description: Verify the mirrored shape is successfully created in the 3D view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D viewport displays two identical bracket shapes that are perfectly symmetric to each other across the central YZ plane.

task_completion.description: Combine the original and mirrored shapes into a Part Compound.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Tree View shows a 'Compound' object that contains both the original bracket body and the mirrored body as its children.

task_completion.description: Save the resulting assembly to the specified file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the filename 'symmetric_bracket_assembly.FCStd' being saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/' directory, or the FreeCAD window title bar is updated to 'symmetric_bracket_assembly'.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeCAD graphical user interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with FreeCAD menus, toolbars, and the Tree View, rather than terminal commands or text editors.

integrity.description: The agent manipulated the 3D model visually rather than solely relying on background scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D viewport updates to reflect the mirroring and compounding steps, showing the actual geometry changes.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file using FreeCAD's save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog is used, rather than terminal commands like 'cp' or 'mv' to rename an existing file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Input file: /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/T8_housing_bracket.FCStd. Expected output file: /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/symmetric_bracket_assembly.FCStd. The model is a parametric mechanical design of a T8 lead screw housing bracket.
